en_title: What Xbox Games Are Being Cancelled?
cn_title: 多款Xbox游戏面临取消危机
subtitle: 看点来了
opus_summary: Xbox新一轮裁员和工作室关闭传闻持续发酵。据泄露消息，Compulsion Games、Ninja Theory和Double Fine三大工作室正面临关闭谈判。

paragraphs.en: Following Xbox’s publicly issued , it was clear that Microsoft’s gaming wing was gearing up for even more lay-offs and studio closures. As of right now, the reality of the situation is being told through leaks and reports. While Xbox has yet to make a statement, it appears that three studios are in negotiations regarding their future: Compulsion , Ninja Theory, and Double Fine. There is a very real chance that all three of these development studios will be shut down. There’s also a very real chance that they are not the only ones facing a fight for survival.
paragraphs.cn: 在Xbox发布公开信后，微软的游戏部门显然正在准备进行更多裁员和工作室关闭。截至目前，实际情况正通过泄露和报道逐渐浮现。虽然Xbox尚未发表正式声明，但似乎有三家工作室正在就其未来进行谈判：Compulsion Games、Ninja Theory和Double Fine。这三家开发工作室被关闭的可能性非常真实。同样非常真实的是，它们可能并不是唯一面临生存之战的工作室。

paragraphs.en: Many players are, understandably, not too familiar with the studios that make their favourite games. If you don’t follow the world of games closely, when there’s news of studio closures, the first questions are naturally “Which Xbox games are shutting down? Which Xbox games are cancelled?” That’s where this list comes in: we’ve made it crystal clear which games are being impacted by Xbox’s current business decisions. Take a look through, find your favourite game or franchise, and we’ll let you know how things are looking.
paragraphs.cn: 许多玩家不熟悉制作自己喜爱游戏的工作室，这完全可以理解。如果你不太关注游戏圈子，当出现工作室关闭的消息时，第一个问题自然是「哪些Xbox游戏要关了？哪些Xbox游戏被取消了？」这就是这份清单的意义所在：我们已清楚列明哪些游戏正受到Xbox当前商业决策的影响。仔细看看，找到你最喜欢的游戏或系列，我们会告诉你目前的情况。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft’s classic real-time strategy series, Age of Empires, is currently developed by World’s Edge Studio . The developer’s current project, the Raiders of the North expansion for Age of Empires 4 , was announced as part of June’s Xbox Games Showcase and is due to launch later this year. So far, there are no reports that suggest World’s Edge Studio is in danger of being shuttered.
paragraphs.cn: 微软的经典即时战略系列《帝国时代》目前由World's Edge Studio负责开发。该工作室当前的项目是《帝国时代4》的「北方掠夺者」扩展包，已在6月的Xbox游戏展示会上公布，预计今年晚些时候发售。截至目前，尚无报道表明World's Edge Studio面临被关闭的危险。

paragraphs.en: Fantasy RPG Avowed launched early 2025 to solid enough reviews but it failed to meet sales targets. While that can put studios in a dangerous position, developer Obsidian Entertainment reportedly still has plans for the world of Eora . That could mean a sequel to Avowed, or it could mean a return to Pillars of Eternity – the duology of isometric RPGs that first introduced the setting. While there’s no official statement to point us in the right direction, both are theoretically viable – Avowed’s design taps into widespread hunger for Elder Scrolls-like games, while a third Pillars of Eternity could prove exceptionally popular thanks to the surge of CRPG popularity following Baldur’s Gate 3.
paragraphs.cn: 奇幻RPG《宣誓》于2025年初发售，评价相当不错，但未能达到销售目标。虽然这可能会让工作室处于危险境地，但据报道，开发商黑曜石娱乐对Eora世界仍有计划。这可能意味着《宣誓》的续作，也可能意味着回归《永恒之柱》——那套率先引入这一设定的等距RPG二部曲。虽然没有官方声明确认方向，但两者在理论上都可行：《宣誓》的设计迎合了玩家对《上古卷轴》式游戏的广泛渴望，而第三部《永恒之柱》则可能因《博德之门3》带来的CRPG热潮而大受欢迎。

paragraphs.en: The fantastic-looking steampunk RPG, Clockwork Revolution , is being developed by inXile Entertainment , the studio that previously created Wasteland 3. Xbox recently announced that Clockwork Revolution will be an Xbox exclusive as part of the company’s re-commitment to console exclusives, and so it seems unlikely that a major piece of Xbox’s plan to please its existing community and build a dedicated customer base would be jettisoned. Currently, there are no reports that indicate inXile Entertainment is planned to be closed.
paragraphs.cn: 那款看起来相当出色的蒸汽朋克RPG《发条革命》正由inXile Entertainment开发，这家工作室此前推出了《废土3》。Xbox最近宣布《发条革命》将成为Xbox独占游戏，作为公司重新重视主机独占策略的一部分，因此Xbox为取悦现有社区并建立忠实用户群而制定的这一重要棋子，似乎不太可能被抛弃。目前没有报道表明inXile Entertainment计划被关闭。

paragraphs.en: The ambitious reboot of Fable is being crafted by a team at Playground Games . While it is a multi-platform game in development for Xbox, PC, and PS5, it is nonetheless a key part of Xbox’s plan of focusing on its core popular franchises. Fable was beloved in the 360 era, and Xbox will be banking on a lovingly-crafted reboot to sell well and earn fans. Playground Games seems to be in no danger, not least because it also develops another popular Xbox franchise…
paragraphs.cn: 野心勃勃的《神鬼寓言》重启正由Playground Games的团队精心打造。虽然这是一款面向Xbox、PC和PS5的多平台游戏，但它仍是Xbox专注于核心热门系列计划的关键组成部分。《神鬼寓言》在Xbox 360时代备受喜爱，Xbox将寄望于一款精心制作的重启作品来大卖并赢得粉丝。Playground Games似乎并无危险，尤其因为它还开发着另一个受欢迎的Xbox系列……

paragraphs.en: Playground Games is split into two development teams: one working on Fable, and the other dedicated to the Forza Horizon series. That latter team only just shipped Forza Horizon 6 , and will now be hard at work keeping it updated and flush with new content. It’s also not unlikely that part of the Forza Horizon team will already be thinking beyond Horizon 6 to what lies in the franchise’s future. Horizon is a key pillar of Xbox, and while the distance between games is growing ever longer (it took five years to create FH6, compared to the three years it took to make FH5, and the two years all prior installments took) as of now, we’re expecting there to be a new game on the distant horizon, so to speak.
paragraphs.cn: Playground Games分为两支开发团队：一支负责《神鬼寓言》，另一支专注于《极限竞速：地平线》系列。后者刚刚推出《极限竞速：地平线6》，接下来将全力维护更新和内容填充。地平线团队的部分成员很可能已经在思考《地平线6》之后的系列未来。地平线是Xbox的重要支柱，尽管游戏开发周期越来越长（《地平线6》花了五年，《地平线5》是三年，而之前所有作品都是两年），但我们相信新作终将出现在遥远的地平线上。

paragraphs.en: While the Forza Horizon series has gone from strength to strength over its almost 15-year lifespan, its parent franchise, Forza Motorsport, developed by Turn 10 , fell into decline over the same period. Historically the two sides of Forza traded places, with the more arcade-like Horizon games arriving between installments of the hardcore driving sim Motorsport games. Following the lackluster launch of 2023’s Forza Motorsport , Turn 10 have since been assigned to aid Playground Games with the Horizon series , and Forza Motorsport as a franchise has ceased production.
paragraphs.cn: 在《极限竞速：地平线》系列近15年生涯中不断壮大的同时，其母系列《极限竞速》（由Turn 10开发）却逐渐衰落。历史上，《极限竞速》的两条分支曾轮流登场，偏街机的《地平线》游戏在硬核驾驶模拟《Motorsport》作品之间推出。在2023年《极限竞速》表现平平之后，Turn 10被调去协助Playground Games开发《地平线》系列，《极限竞速》系列本身则已停止制作。

paragraphs.en: If Xbox’s brand colour wasn’t green, it’d probably be red – so synonymous is the blood-splattered Gears of War with Microsoft’s gaming division. While the series was originally created for the Xbox 360 by Epic Games, Gears is now developed by one of Xbox’s own studios, The Coalition . Its latest project is Gears of War: E-Day , set to launch this October. As announced at the recent Xbox Games Showcase, it will be an Xbox console exclusive , and thus marks a significant step in Xbox’s big plan: its mini experiment in multi-platform releases is (sort of) over, and E-Day will stay on Gears’ home turf. While Gears 4 and 5 don’t have the reputation of the original trilogy, the series is generally quite popular, and so The Coalition seems to be in a safe spot. Gears will continue.
paragraphs.cn: 如果Xbox的品牌色不是绿色，那多半是红色——血腥四溅的《战争机器》几乎就是微软游戏部门的代名词。该系列最初由Epic Games为Xbox 360打造，如今则由Xbox自家工作室The Coalition开发。最新作《战争机器：事变日》定于今年十月发售。在最近的Xbox游戏展示会上公布时，已确认将是Xbox主机独占，这标志着Xbox大计划迈出重要一步：其多平台发行的小规模实验（某种程度上）结束了，《事变日》将留在《战争机器》的主场。虽然《战争机器4》和《战争机器5》的口碑不及原三部曲，但系列整体人气依然很高，因此The Coalition的地位似乎很安全。《战争机器》还会继续。

paragraphs.en: Currently in early access, Grounded 2 is an unusual project for developer Obsidian Entertainment . This team is best-known for its RPGs, having developed Fallout: New Vegas, Pillars of Eternity, and more recently The Outer Worlds 2 and Avowed. But while multiplayer survival isn’t a major part of the studio’s history, Grounded 2 has been a hit. Much like its predecessor, it’s a comparatively cheaper project than the heavy lifts Obsidian’s RPGs are. While there are questions around the developer’s other projects , Grounded 2 and Obsidian appear to be safe.
paragraphs.cn: 目前处于抢先体验阶段的《禁闭求生2》对开发商黑曜石来说是个非典型项目。这家团队以RPG闻名，曾开发《辐射：新维加斯》《永恒之柱》，以及近期的《天外世界2》和《宣誓》。虽然多人联机生存并不是该工作室的主打方向，但《禁闭求生2》却大获成功。和前作一样，本作相比黑曜石那些费力的大体量RPG成本较低。尽管该开发商的其他项目存在变数，《禁闭求生2》和黑曜石目前看来暂无危险。

paragraphs.en: The idea of Xbox without Halo is unthinkable. And yet, for the past few years, Halo has felt endangered. Halo Infinite was not the mega-hit Xbox would have been hoping for, both in terms of reception to its open-world campaign and the longevity of its free-to-play multiplayer. Developer 343 Industries would later be a victim of Microsoft’s brutal restructuring in 2023 , with many staff laid off. This seems to have been a trigger point for something of a reset for the Master Chief - 343i was rebranded as Halo Studios , the studio’s bespoke Slipspace Engine was retired in favour of Unreal Engine 5, and the next game in the series is a remake of the very first Halo , now dubbed “Campaign Evolved.” So while Halo has experienced troubles, it seems like we can expect Xbox to still push forward with the Master Chief. The green Spartan is safe for now.
paragraphs.cn: 没有《光环》的Xbox简直无法想象。然而过去几年，《光环》系列却一直处境堪忧。《光环：无限》并没有成为Xbox期望的超级爆款，无论是开放世界战役的接受度还是免费多人模式的持久性都未达预期。开发商343 Industries后来在微软2023年的残酷重组中遭裁员，许多员工离职。这似乎成了士官长一次重启的契机——343工作室更名为光环工作室，其自研的Slipspace引擎被弃用，转向Unreal Engine 5，系列的下一部作品正是初代《光环》的重制版，现在代号为「战役进化」。因此，尽管《光环》经历了波折，我们似乎可以期待Xbox仍会推动士官长继续前行。这位绿色斯巴达战士目前是安全的。

paragraphs.en: One of the world’s best-selling, most enduringly popular games, Minecraft from developer Mojang Studios seems in no danger at all. The original game continues to go strong, with a detailed roadmap for 2026 and another spin-off on the way – this September will see the launch of ARPG Minecraft Dungeons 2 , made in collaboration between Mojang and Double Eleven.
paragraphs.cn: 作为全球最畅销、最长盛不衰的游戏之一，Mojang Studios开发的《我的世界》似乎毫无危险可言。原版游戏依然势头强劲，拥有详尽的2026年路线图，另一部衍生作品也即将到来——今年9月将推出动作角色扮演游戏《我的世界：地下城2》，由Mojang和Double Eleven合作开发。

paragraphs.en: Last year saw the launch of sci-fi RPG The Outer Worlds 2 . Developed by Obsidian Entertainment , it followed in the footsteps of its predecessor, which in turn followed in the footsteps of Obsidian’s own Fallout: New Vegas – a satirical role-playing game with lots of interesting choices, fantastic writing, memorable companions, and wild weaponry. Unfortunately, The Outer Worlds 2 failed to meet Xbox’s sales goals , and so it will be the final game in the series. The Outer Worlds is over as a running series, although Obsidian Entertainment as a studio thankfully remains in operation.
paragraphs.cn: 去年，科幻RPG《天外世界2》正式推出。这款由黑曜石开发的作品继承了前作的衣钵，而前作本身则延续了黑曜石自家《辐射：新维加斯》的路线——一部充满讽刺意味的角色扮演游戏，提供了大量有趣的选择、精湛的剧本、令人难忘的同伴以及千奇百怪的武器。遗憾的是，《天外世界2》未能达到Xbox的销售预期，因此它将成为该系列的最后一作。《天外世界》这个系列已宣告终结，好在黑曜石工作室仍在运营。

paragraphs.en: Developer Double Fine Productions is known for many creative and quirky games, including last year’s brilliant lighthouse adventure Keeper , 360-era metal cult classic Brutal Legend , and remasters of beloved point-and-click games Full Throttle and Grim Fandango . These are the games that have made the studio one of my personal favourites. However, perhaps its most iconic output is Psychonauts – a duology (with a couple of spin-offs) that started waaay back in 2005 on the original Xbox and finally continued in 2021 with the long-awaited sequel . Unfortunately, the future of Psychonauts and all of Double Fine’s games – including the recently released multiplayer game Kiln – is reportedly on the line, as it is one of three Xbox studios believed to be facing closure .
paragraphs.cn: 开发商Double Fine Productions以诸多充满创意与古怪的游戏闻名，包括去年精彩的灯塔冒险《Keeper》、360时代的金属经典《Brutal Legend》，以及备受喜爱的点击解谜游戏《Full Throttle》和《Grim Fandango》的重制版。这些作品让该工作室成为我个人最喜欢的开发者之一。不过，也许它最具标志性的作品是《意航员》——一个二部曲系列（附带一些衍生作品），最早可追溯到2005年的初代Xbox，并在2021年终于推出了期待已久的续作。不幸的是，据报道，《意航员》以及Double Fine的所有游戏——包括最近推出的多人游戏《Kiln》——都前途未卜，因为它是三家据称面临关闭的Xbox工作室之一。

paragraphs.en: The recently announced Senua marks the continuation of the Hellblade series in all but name. This gritty tale of a psychosis-suffering celtic warrior has been running since 2017, and is developer Ninja Theory ’s most enduring series, despite poor performance in terms of copies sold and failing to crack Game Pass’ top 10 during its second game's launch window . Yet despite having only just revealed Senua, Ninja Theory is now one of the three Xbox studios facing closure . Reports suggest that Senua was announced because Xbox believed “the promise of a newly announced game would help draw investor interest in the studio.” It’s currently unclear if an investor will buy Ninja Theory, and thus allow development on Senua to continue. As it stands, we may never see the game completed and released.
paragraphs.cn: 最近公布的《塞娜》标志着《地狱之刃》系列的延续，只不过换了名字。这个关于一名饱受精神病折磨的凯尔特战士的沉重故事自2017年一直延续至今，是开发商Ninja Theory最持久的系列，尽管销售数量不佳，且在第二款游戏发售窗口期间未能进入GamePass前十。然而，尽管刚刚揭晓《塞娜》，Ninja Theory如今已是面临关闭的三家Xbox工作室之一。有报道称，之所以公布《塞娜》，是因为Xbox认为「新游戏的承诺有助于吸引投资者对该工作室的兴趣」。目前尚不清楚是否有投资者会收购Ninja Theory，从而让《塞娜》的开发得以继续。就目前情况而言，我们也许永远看不到这款游戏完成并面世了。

paragraphs.en: 2025’s bayou-set adventure game, South of Midnight, had stunning art direction and received solid enough reviews, but it seemed to fly under the radar. That’s not an unusual situation for Canadian studio Compulsion Games – its previous title, BioShock-ish survival game We Happy Few, never quite set the world alight in the way its initial trailer suggested it had the potential to. And its debut game, Contrast, is perhaps better remembered for being the very first PS4 game included in PlayStation Plus than for its own achievements. Unfortunately, such a history seems to have put the studio in danger: it is one of the three developers reportedly planned for closure . While we didn’t expect a sequel to South of Midnight, since all of Compulsion's games have been original creations, this does mean there’s little chance of the studio creating something new.
paragraphs.cn: 2025年的沼泽冒险游戏《午夜之南》拥有惊人的艺术指导，也获得了相当扎实的评价，但它似乎并未引起太多关注。这对加拿大工作室Compulsion Games来说并不异常——它的上一部作品、类似《生化奇兵》的生存游戏《少数幸运儿》，从未像其首支预告片所暗示的那样真正点燃市场热情。而它的处女作《对照》，或许更广为人知的是作为第一款加入PlayStationPlus的PS4游戏，而非自身的成就。不幸的是，这样的历史似乎让工作室陷入了危险：它是三家据报道计划关闭的开发商之一。虽然我们并未指望《午夜之南》推出续作，因为Compulsion的所有游戏均为原创IP，但这确实意味着该工作室几乎不可能再创造全新的作品了。

paragraphs.en: The third State of Decay game has been a long time coming. Developer Undead Labs has been working on it for at least six years – it was announced at the Xbox Games Showcase in 2020 , two years after State of Decay 2 launched. Only this year did we get to see a gameplay trailer , and those years of radio silence could convince anyone that State of Decay 3 was stuck in development hell, and thus Undead Labs was in danger of shut down. However, there have been no reports to suggest the studio is facing closure, and on Xbox, PC, and PS5.
paragraphs.cn: 第三款《腐烂国度》游戏已经酝酿了很久。开发商Undead Labs至少已为之投入六年——它早在2020年的Xbox游戏展示会上就已公布，即《腐烂国度2》发售两年之后。直到今年我们才看到一支实机预告片，而这些年的沉寂足以让人相信《腐烂国度3》陷入了开发地狱，Undead Labs也因此面临关闭风险。不过，目前没有任何报道指出该工作室面临关闭，游戏将登陆Xbox、PC和PS5。

paragraphs.en: For 33 years, id Software has been developing the Doom series, and it seems in no danger of stopping. It announced a new expansion for Doom: The Dark Ages at the Xbox Games Showcase – called Revelations, launching July 7 – and there’s no sign that the studio is in danger of being shuttered.
paragraphs.cn: 33年来，idSoftware一直在开发《毁灭战士》系列，而且丝毫没有停下来的迹象。它在Xbox游戏展示会上公布了《毁灭战士：黑暗时代》的新扩展内容《启示录》，将于7月7日推出——没有任何迹象表明该工作室有关闭的危险。

paragraphs.en: Developed by Zenimax Online Studios , The Elder Scrolls Online is Bethesda’s long-running MMO. Over its 12 year lifespan so far, it has received eight major expansions and countless updates, with the latest being a season focused on the Thieves Guild . While it had a somewhat rocky start, TESO eventually settled into being a beloved online haunt for Elder Scrolls fans, and the developers hope it will last for over 30 years . Zenimax Online Studios was a victim of Microsoft’s 2025 layoffs, , but currently there is nothing to suggest the studio or TESO is in danger of shut down.
paragraphs.cn: 《上古卷轴OL》由Zenimax Online Studios开发，是贝塞斯达长期运营的MMO。在它迄今为止12年的生命周期里，已经推出了八部大型资料片和无数更新，最新的一个赛季专注于盗贼公会。虽然开局有些坎坷，但《上古卷轴OL》最终成了《上古卷轴》粉丝钟爱的线上家园，开发者希望它能持续运营超过30年。Zenimax Online Studios在微软2025年的裁员中受到了冲击，但目前没有任何迹象表明这家工作室或《上古卷轴OL》面临关闭的危险。

paragraphs.en: The jewel in Bethesda’s crown, The Elder Scrolls likely has little to worry about when it comes to cancellation. Developed by Bethesda Game Studios , the studio at the heart of Xbox’s Bethesda Softworks wing, the series became an unstoppable force during the era of Skyrim, and so fans eagerly await The Elder Scrolls 6. Xbox knows that TES6 is primed to be one of the biggest games of all time, and so will likely do everything it can to ensure it finally arrives. Recent reports have suggested that new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma is looking to speed up development of The Elder Scrolls .
paragraphs.cn: 作为贝塞斯达皇冠上的明珠，《上古卷轴》系列在取消这件事上大概没什么可担心的。系列由B社/贝塞斯达Game Studios开发——这家工作室是Xbox旗下贝塞斯达软件部门的核心——在《天际》时代成为了一股不可阻挡的力量，粉丝们因此急切盼望着《上古卷轴6》。Xbox知道《上古卷轴6》注定会成为史上最重磅的游戏之一，因此很可能会尽一切努力确保它最终问世。近期的报道显示，新任Xbox CEO Asha Sharma正试图加快《上古卷轴》的开发进度。

paragraphs.en: Second only to The Elder Scrolls is Bethesda Games Studios ’ other open-world RPG series, Fallout. It’s been a long time since the developer launched a single-player entry – Fallout 4 is a decade old now – but its multiplayer survival spin-off, Fallout 76, still goes strong with regular updates. Both Elder Scrolls and Fallout are reportedly of particular interest to Xbox CEO Asha Sharma , and so we can expect the post-nuclear roleplaying game to play a major role in Xbox’s future.
paragraphs.cn: 仅次于《上古卷轴》的，是B社/贝塞斯达Game Studios的另一款开放世界角色扮演游戏系列《辐射》。该工作室的单机作品已经很久没有推出了——《辐射4》已经发售十年——但其多人生存衍生作《辐射76》依然凭借定期更新保持着强劲势头。据报道，《上古卷轴》和《辐射》都受到了Xbox CEO Asha Sharma的特别关注，因此我们可以期待这款后核战角色扮演游戏将在Xbox的未来中扮演重要角色。

paragraphs.en: Following in the footsteps of PlayStation, which has its Spider-Man and Wolverine games, Xbox is getting in on the Marvel action with Blade. First announced back in 2023 , we’ve heard not a single thing about it since. For some, that’s a reason to worry - Blade is being developed by Arkane Studios , the creators of Dishonored and Deathloop. Arkane’s games are typically critical darlings that struggle to find large audiences, and so there’s always the fear that the studio will be closed down. Such fears are not unfounded - Arkane was once made up of two studios, one in Lyon, France and the other in Austin, Texas, but the Austin branch was shuttered in 2024 . There is, thankfully, no report to suggest that the Lyon studio is due to meet the same fate.
paragraphs.cn: 继PlayStation推出《蜘蛛侠》和《金刚狼》游戏之后，Xbox也正凭借《Blade》涉足漫威动作游戏领域。该作最早于2023年公布，此后我们再也没有听到任何消息。对一些人来说，这足以令人担忧——《Blade》由Arkane Studios开发，也就是《耻辱》和《死亡循环》的缔造者。Arkane的游戏通常是评论界的宠儿，却难以找到大量受众，因此一直有人担心这家工作室会被关闭。这种担忧并非毫无根据——Arkane曾由两家工作室组成，一家在法国里昂，另一家在德克萨斯州奥斯汀，但奥斯汀分部已于2024年关闭。所幸目前没有报道显示里昂工作室即将遭遇相同的命运。

paragraphs.en: Developer MachineGames has a strong history with games about fighting Nazis. It was assembled to develop the rebooted Wolfenstein series, of which it has made two mainline entries plus a co-op spin-off. Its latest work, however, is the equally fantastic Indiana Jones and the Great Circle. While so far unconfirmed by official sources, it’s believed that MachineGames is currently developing Wolfenstein 3 . It is also working with Amazon MGM Studios to create a Wolfenstein TV show . All that considered, it seems the future of the studio and Wolfenstein is safe.
paragraphs.cn: 开发商MachineGames在制作对抗纳粹的游戏方面底蕴深厚。这支团队是为了重启《德军总部》系列而组建的，已推出两款正传作品外加一部合作衍生作。而他们最新的作品则是同样精彩的《夺宝奇兵：古老之圈》。尽管尚未得到官方证实，但外界普遍认为MachineGames正在开发《德军总部3》。该工作室还在与Amazon MGM Studios合作打造一部《德军总部》电视剧。综合来看，这家工作室和《德军总部》系列的未来似乎是安全的。

paragraphs.en: Between ongoing support for Diablo 2: Resurrected and continual updates and expansions for Diablo 4, Blizzard ’s gothic ARPG series is probably in the best position it has ever been. A 25 year old game has a brand new class , and the Lord of Hatred expansion brings Diablo 4’s story to a satisfying conclusion . It seems safe to assume for now that Blizzard’s Diablo team will keep the fires of hell well stoked.
paragraphs.cn: 一边是《暗黑破坏神2：重制版》的持续支持，另一边是《暗黑破坏神4》不断的更新和资料片，暴雪这款哥特风ARPG系列或许正处于史上最好的时期。一款25年的老游戏迎来了一个全新的职业，而「憎恨之王」资料片则为《暗黑破坏神4》的故事画上了令人满意的句号。目前大概可以放心地认为，暴雪的暗黑破坏神团队会让地狱之火继续熊熊燃烧。

paragraphs.en: Overwatch's Season 3: Into the Tiger's Den has just launched, bolstering Blizzard ’s competitive FPS with even more content. Overwatch has undeniably had a rocky life, starting 10 years ago as a genuine phenomenon and contender for best online shooter of all time, and then spending years struggling to evolve through a misguided sequel and shifts to its core composition. But right now, it is in perhaps its best position since those early halcyon days. You can expect Blizzard to keep Overwatch live and kicking with new heroes and ideas.
paragraphs.cn: 《守望先锋》第3赛季「深入虎穴」已经上线，为暴雪这款竞技FPS注入了更多内容。不可否认，《守望先锋》一路走来颇为坎坷，十年前它横空出世，一度被视为现象级作品和史上最佳在线射击游戏的有力竞争者，随后却因方向错误的续作和核心结构的变动，在多年间挣扎着寻求进化。但如今，这款游戏或许正处于最初辉煌岁月以来的最佳状态。你可以期待暴雪会用新英雄和新创意，让《守望先锋》继续保持活力。

paragraphs.en: World of Warcraft has been trucking along for over 20 years now, and Blizzard seems in no way ready to send its genre-defining MMO out to pasture any time soon. The Midnight Revelations update just dropped, and the main Midnight expansion arrived earlier this year. That expansion is also the middle chapter of the three-part “Worldsoul Saga”, which began in 2024 with The War Within and is expected to end with The Last Titan. Based on typical expansion cadence, it seems sensible to expect that in 2028.
paragraphs.cn: 《魔兽世界》已经走过了20多个年头，暴雪似乎完全无意让自己这款定义了整个类型的MMO功成身退。「午夜启示」更新刚刚发布，而作为主打的《午夜》资料片则于今年早些时候推出。这部资料片同时也是「世界之魂传奇」三部曲的中间章节，三部曲始于2024年的《地心之战》，预计将以《最后的泰坦》收尾。按照资料片惯常的发布节奏，我们有理由期待它在2028年到来。

paragraphs.en: While Xbox’s repeated shutting down of studios means it can often feel that any of its games are at risk of cancellation, there is at least one series that feels practically immortal: Call of Duty. Developed by Activision’s army of FPS studios, there has been a COD game every year for over two decades. 2026 will be no different, with the launch of Modern Warfare 4 in October. While the Call of Duty studios have not been immune to layoffs in the past , the core studios that develop the series – Infinity Ward , Treyarch and Raven Software – are all still operational, as are the many support studios that aid them in the monolithic task of creating annual installments.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然Xbox一而再地关闭工作室，常常让人觉得它旗下的任何游戏都可能面临取消的风险，但至少有一个系列给人的感觉几乎是永生的：《使命召唤》。这款由Activision旗下FPS工作室大军开发的游戏，在过去20多年里每年都会推出一部新作。2026年也不例外，今年10月《现代战争4》即将上市。尽管《使命召唤》各工作室过去也未能幸免于裁员，但负责开发该系列的核心工作室——Infinity Ward、Treyarch和Raven Software——仍在正常运作，协助它们完成每年一部这一庞大任务的众多支援工作室同样如此。
